parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": $env.SARVAM_MODEL || "sarvam-105b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a sales-focused customer inquiry classifier for a demo workflow. Think internally if needed, but output ONLY compact raw JSON with no markdown and no explanation. Required keys: type, priority, confidence. Classify pricing, demo, procurement, enterprise, seats, onboarding, automation, implementation timeline, or purchase-intent messages as sales_inquiry. type must be one of sales_inquiry, support_ticket, complaint, general_question, order_request. priority must be low, medium, or high. confidence must be a number from 0 to 1." }, { "role": "user", "content": `Subject: ${$('Normalize_Input').item.json.subject}\nBody: ${$('Normalize_Input').item.json.original_inquiry}` }], "max_tokens": 1500, "temperature": 0 } }}

fileId.value: ={{ (() => { const intent = String($('Validate_Classifier').item.json.classification?.type || ''); const byIntent = { sales_inquiry: $env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_KB_SALES_FILE_ID || '1H81rJBmEoQ9oTd6lIzUIWxIAAW_JZlEb2HmpVL0nEwU', support_ticket: $env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_KB_SUPPORT_FILE_ID || '1yEjWTDOWy8tVk7XENVtdmkxlFakMQrljFzEn06iyucE', complaint: $env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_KB_COMPLAINT_FILE_ID || '1CzRauQmDPKa8OvgLLMPOxHveXbrG-277Uv-IMWpF4C0', general_question: $env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_KB_GENERAL_FILE_ID || '1gGHxi93GE5OrV3m6twWy86pzMunq2lMgvTomNMy5q-o', order_request: $env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_KB_ORDER_FILE_ID || '1kII7FmOR54UZ5bUNI_MXIDmcUfn_AUHTLptvimbagzo' }; return byIntent[intent] || $env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_KB_DEFAULT_FILE_ID || '1GrWRxL57O7yGiDK6YSL-v40kkFw1dj4JAaY8Ym3tQs4' || $env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_KB_FILE_ID || ''; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": $env.SARVAM_MODEL || "sarvam-105b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are a sales lead qualifier. Think internally if needed, but output ONLY compact raw JSON with no markdown and no explanation. Required keys: lead_score, reason. lead_score must be a number from 1 to 10. Score sales inquiries higher when they mention pricing, demo, procurement, team size, enterprise requirements, or implementation timeline. reason must be one sentence." }, { "role": "user", "content": `Inquiry: ${$json.original_inquiry}\nClassification: ${JSON.stringify($json.classification)}\nResearch: ${JSON.stringify($json.research)}` }], "max_tokens": 1500, "temperature": 0 } }}

={{ { "model": $env.SARVAM_MODEL || "sarvam-105b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are an execution coordinator. Think internally if needed, but output ONLY compact raw JSON with no markdown and no explanation. Required keys: sent, channel, logged. Use {\"sent\":true,\"channel\":\"gmail\",\"logged\":true}." }, { "role": "user", "content": `Draft reply: ${$('Responder_JSON').item.json.draft_reply}\nChannel: gmail` }], "max_tokens": 1500, "temperature": 0 } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const base = $('Validate_Executor').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...base, reply_sent: true, status: 'sent', delivery_mode: 'auto' } }];

const base = $('Validate_Executor').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...base, reply_sent: false, status: 'review_required', delivery_mode: 'review' } }];

documentId.value: ={{ (() => { const sheet = $env.GOOGLE_SHEET_ID || '1QOuxtk3kwQz6jCYj5zghQHKSex3eDa-g_Ldph8Y-t4c'; const match = sheet.match(/\/d\/([^/]+)/); return match ? match[1] : sheet.split('?')[0].split('#')[0]; })() }}
